title: Diff / Patch
description: Generate a unified diff from two texts (adjustable context), or apply a patch back onto a source; color-coded lines and add/del stats. Fully local.

notice.title: Fully local
notice.body: Diff generation and patch application all run in your browser — text is never uploaded.

diff.identical: Both sides are identical — no diff.

apply.patchPlaceholder: Paste a unified diff (with @@ hunk markers)
apply.empty: Paste a patch to see the applied result here.

error.no_hunks: No @@ hunks found — this does not look like a valid unified diff.
error.hunk_mismatch: Patch could not be applied (context mismatch — wrong source version?).
